narrative:
St Bernard 1-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 778 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.9 percentage points.
